subject: Re: Boxnet vs 3090
body:
Hi all,
I also have the denoising problem with RTX 1080
在2021年2月28日星期日 UTC+8 下午9:33:40<Lucas Farnung> 写道：

> Hi all,
>
> I can report having the same issue. I just finished building a new 
> workstation with an 3090. Both particle picking and denoising in Warp do 
> not work. It seems as if Warp is loading the models but Warp does not 
> progress beyond this point.
>
> Best wishes,
> Lucas 
>
>
